summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mock Testing Suite v3.0 major update features including colorful emoji sidebar icons, styled action buttons, searchable Discord popup, improved Call Scenario Card with randomizers, Sup Transfer scenario fix, pronouns helper text, Gemini prompt settings, and backend API functionality
passed_tests: All backend API endpoints working correctly (7/7 tests passed)
Sidebar emoji icons present for all nav items (Home 🏠, Basics 📋, Calls 📞, Sup Transfer 🔄, Review 📄, History 📊, Settings ⚙️, Help ❓)
Discord Post button styled correctly (blue/purple action-discord class)
Cert Spreadsheet button styled correctly (gray action-cert class)
Sheets button properly hidden when disabled
Discord popup opens with search functionality working
Discord search input filters templates correctly
Calls page Scenario Card displays caller info, show, donation details
Regenerate button re-rolls random variables successfully
Sup Transfer scenario text grammatically correct (no 'was wants to cancel' error)
Basics page pronouns field has correct helper text: 'Optional — for accurate summaries'
Settings General tab has no Google Docs Integration section (Ticker Doc URL, Auto-Updater Doc URL removed)
Settings Gemini tab shows editable Coaching Summary Prompt and Reason for Fail Prompt textareas when enabled
All pages navigate correctly via sidebar (8/8 navigation tests passed)
App loads without errors and displays correctly
